title: — Synopsis
text:
Use this command to invoke single phase of the "node" workflow
kubeadm upgrade node phase [flags]

-h, --help
help for phase
help for phase

--rootfs string
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
